purpose: Validation and diagnostics hooks for source freshness/cadence/completeness before engine semantics are implemented.

hooks.description: Age in seconds from source mtime or packet event_time to evaluator time.
Observed cadence between packet/timestamp progression points.
Packet and trace continuity across observation/exporter/adapter/intake/advisory surfaces.
Per-family present-field ratio against interface scaffolding.
List of missing mandatory fields grouped by state family.
Type mismatch or malformed field values grouped by state family.
Forbidden ownership or authority-like fields detected in candidate states.
Optional checks against Phase 1 core/extended schema requirements.

governance_notice: Telemetry is non-authoritative and diagnostics-only. No runtime execution/risk/governor semantics may be inferred from telemetry outputs.
